title: Twitter @_lewtun
summary:
Each supported model comes with a set of *features* that enable you to export models for different types of topologies or tasks. 

As shown in the table, each feature is associated with a different "auto class" in 🤗 Transformers https://t.co/Ak6ElFYioA
